privileged_info_summary: The task requires configuring a synthetic Google OAuth client for a Rocket.Chat instance. The expected Client ID (49204819204-novatech.apps.googleusercontent.com) and Secret (GOCSPX-NovaTechSecretKey2026) exactly match the task description and verifier.py logic. Furthermore, the API keys used to extract and set these values (Accounts_OAuth_Google, Accounts_OAuth_Google_id, and Accounts_OAuth_Google_secret) have been verified against the official Rocket.Chat source code in apps/meteor/server/settings/oauth.ts.
